free_product_reference.variant_basis: The supplied product image is the women's trouser, every supplied sizing comment discusses XS-S or M and a 26-inch waist, and the official page lists the women's range as XS-S, M, and L-XL.

rules: Research the supplied official reference URL and same-domain official specifications, FAQ, or manual fresh for this campaign.
Resolve the exact variant before capture; ask the user if more than one variant could apply.
Map only appearance and function facts into product_truth under the standing exact-parity authorization.
Do not propose or transfer improvements, branding, trademarks, price, promotions, ratings, testimonials, shipping, returns, or warranty.
Other official competitor observations remain C evidence and cannot authorize offered-product claims.
